RULERSTATE.LABEL: Token Drag Ruler
RULERSTATE.HINT: Set to 'Default' to use global defaults for grid type, otherwise set to 'Enabled' or 'Disabled' to override.

DISABLEOUTOFCOMBAT.LABEL: Disable Out of Combat
DISABLEOUTOFCOMBAT.HINT: Toggle on to disable the drag ruler by default when not in an active encounter

ENABLEGRIDLESS.LABEL: Enable for Gridless Scenes
ENABLEGRIDLESS.HINT: Toggle on to enable the drag ruler by default for gridless scenes

ENABLEGRIDDED.LABEL: Enable for Gridded Scenes
ENABLEGRIDDED.HINT: Toggle on to enable the drag ruler by default for scenes with a grid

SEGMENTSTYLEOVERRIDE.LABEL: Segment Style Overrides
SEGMENTSTYLEOVERRIDE.HINT: Options to customize the look of line segments when dragging tokens.

WAYPOINTSTYLEOVERRIDE.LABEL: Waypoint Style Overrides
WAYPOINTSTYLEOVERRIDE.HINT: Options to customize the look of waypoints along the drag ruler.

GRIDHIGHLIGHTSTYLEOVERRIDE.LABEL: Grid Highlight Style Overrides
GRIDHIGHLIGHTSTYLEOVERRIDE.HINT: Options to customize the look of the drag ruler's grid highlight
